TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang batbato'an ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 32 buwan, 81 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 79 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 93%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na batbato'an hya' ga ray'in. tay mkyahu' na batbato'an hya' ga tamayo'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βatβatoʔan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rajʔin. taj mkjaħuʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa tamajoʔan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang batbato'an ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 32 buwan, 81 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 79 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 93%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na batbato'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na batbato'an hya' ga ray'in. tay mkyahu' na batbato'an hya' ga tamayo'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βatβatoʔan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rajʔin. taj mkjaħuʔ na βatβatoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa tamajoʔan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
